data.title: CertiK outlines plan to pursue public listing following Binance investment
data.description:
CertiK, a Web3 security services provider, said in an announcement shared with Finbold on January 23, it is targeting a public listing as part of its ambition to become the first publicly traded Web3 infrastructure company. Its plans for a public listing are supported by a recent investment from Binance, making the exchange CertiK’s largest investor so far. Focus on institutional security platforms and formal verification CertiK said it is expanding its enterprise offering through Skynet Enterprise, a security platform designed to meet the transparency, risk visibility, and data quality requirements of large institutions and regulators.  The company added it is collaborating with multiple regulatory bodies to deploy the platform, which uses on-chain monitoring to deliver real-time alerts and visibility into security events and ecosystem risks
source: https://finbold.com/certik-outlines-plan-to-pursue-public-listing-following-binance-investment/

data.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs Shed $1.62B in Four-Day Negative Streak
data.description:

source: https://decrypt.co/355692/spot-bitcoin-etfs-shed-1-62b-in-four-day-negative-streak

data.title: Optimism DAO Considers Monthly Buyback of OP Tokens
data.description: Optimism DAO is currently voting on a proposal to allocate 50% of Superchain revenue for the monthly buyback of OP governance tokens. According to NS3.AI, this proposal has ignited a debate among delegates. Proponents see it as a beneficial move to bolster the token's price, while opponents warn it could deplete capital and undermine the project's financial stability. The plan involves conducting buybacks over-the-counter, which has led to concerns about their real effect on market prices and the possibility of misuse.

data.title: Intel's Q4 2025 Earnings Surpass Expectations Amid AI Demand
data.description: Intel has announced its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings, which exceeded expectations due to robust demand for artificial intelligence technologies. According to NS3.AI, the company, however, provided a less optimistic outlook for the first quarter of 2026, citing supply constraints as a significant challenge. Intel anticipates first-quarter revenue of $12.2 billion, falling short of analyst predictions, and projects zero earnings per share, compared to the expected $0.08. Following this guidance, Intel's shares dropped by over 11% in after-hours trading, impacting its year-to-date performance despite a strong rally over the past year.

data.title: The Optimism DAO token buyback proposal has sparked controversy in the community, and voting is scheduled to end on January 28.
data.description: On January 23, the Optimism DAO began voting on a landmark proposal to use 50% of the Optimism Superchain network's revenue to buy back OP governance tokens monthly. However, the proposal has sparked controversy within the community. Supporters like Milo Bowman believe the buyback program would boost the token price and demonstrate growth potential; while opponents like GFX Labs worry that the buyback, conducted through over-the-counter trading, lacks market transparency and could potentially impact the project's financial sustainability. Currently, delegates have cast over 3.8 million votes in favor of the proposal, with only approximately 19,000 votes against. Voting will continue until January 28. (DL News)

data.title: U.S. Consumer Sentiment Rises in January 2026
data.description: U.S. consumer sentiment saw an increase in January 2026, according to the University of Michigan survey. According to NS3.AI, the sentiment index rose to 56.4, reflecting a 6.6% rise from the previous month, though it remains 21.3% lower compared to the same period last year. The current conditions index improved to 55.4, while the expectations index reached 57.0. Furthermore, one-year inflation expectations dropped to 4.0%, the lowest level observed in recent years.

data.title: Trump's second son: The market capitalization of USD1 has surpassed that of PayPal's stablecoin PYUSD.
data.description: Eric Trump, the second son of Donald Trump, posted on the X platform that USD1's market capitalization has surpassed that of PayPal's stablecoin PYUSD, marking a significant milestone for USD1. This is not just about cryptocurrency, but about building the future of global currency.

data.title: Hedera's HBAR Faces Key Resistance Amid Bearish Sentiment
data.description:
Hedera's native token, HBAR, is currently trading near a crucial support level at $0.108, facing challenges in surpassing the $0.114 resistance. According to NS3.AI, this resistance level is significant due to the concentration of short positions. A rise above $0.114 could potentially lead to approximately $4.5 million in short liquidations, which might result in a sharp price movement.

Despite this potential, investor participation appears to be weakening, and there are ongoing outflows, indicating a bearish sentiment in the market. This situation makes a recovery uncertain unless HBAR can clearly break above critical Fibonacci retracement levels.

data.title: CZ predicts Bitcoin may enter a supercycle this year.
data.description: According to market sources, Binance founder CZ predicted in an interview with CNBC in Davos that Bitcoin may enter a supercycle this year.

data.title: Analysis: Trump's renewed attacks on the Federal Reserve prompted markets to seek safe havens, pushing silver prices above $100 per ounce.
data.description: Silver prices rose above $100 per ounce during Friday's US trading session, marking a daily gain of over 3% and a cumulative weekly increase of 13%. Factors driving the price surge included concerns about the conflicts in Iran and Ukraine, and Trump's pursuit of Greenland on the global stage at this week's Davos conference. Neil Welsh, head of metals at Britannia Global Markets, stated, "Shifting geopolitical dynamics and renewed attacks on the Federal Reserve are prompting a rush to seek safe havens." Analysts noted that the $100 level is a so-called "psychological price point" for silver. Trump's comments about a US "fleet" heading towards Iran spurred investor buying of silver, while also pushing up prices for base metals such as gold and copper. (Jinshi)

data.title: Coinbase report: Crypto market structure is more robust after adjustment, Q1 outlook is optimistic.
data.description: Coinbase Institutional's latest Charting Crypto report states that after the adjustment at the end of 2025, the crypto market's structural foundation is more solid in the first few months of 2026, market positioning is improving, and the market environment is more balanced, a trend expected to continue into the first quarter. The decline in the fourth quarter of last year helped clear previously accumulated excessive leverage and speculative positions, and the current environment indicates the market is recalibrating rather than returning to aggressive risk-taking. Investor participation remains active but more cautious, and position allocation is more rational and orderly than in previous expansion phases, reducing downside risk and making the market more resilient to shocks. Furthermore, the macro environment is acting as a "buffer." The report states that while uncertainties regarding monetary policy, geopolitics, and regulation remain, these risks are increasingly being priced in and reflected in position structures rather than triggering sudden, sharp fluctuations, thus leading to a more rational and restrained market reaction. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Market Patience: A Key Difference Between Experienced Traders and Newcomers
data.description: CyrilXBT posted on X highlighting the contrasting approaches between seasoned traders and newcomers in the financial markets. According to CyrilXBT, experienced traders, often referred to as 'ogs,' tend to exhibit patience during periods of low market activity, maintaining liquidity until favorable conditions arise. In contrast, newcomers frequently rush into trades, often resulting in losses and subsequent claims of scams. CyrilXBT emphasizes the importance of patience, noting that markets can experience significant growth after periods of stagnation, as seen in instances where market conditions improve months later. The advice serves as a cautionary note for new traders to avoid impulsive decisions and to adopt a more strategic approach to trading.

data.title: Spot silver rose more than $28 in the first month of the new year, a cumulative increase of nearly 40%.
data.description: Following APMEX (American Precious Metals Exchange), brokerage trading platforms showed that spot silver prices reached $100 per ounce, a nearly 4% increase on the day, and a cumulative increase of over $28 in the first month of the new year, representing a nearly 40% increase. Since the end of November last year, spot silver prices have almost doubled, with the upward trend accelerating significantly in the past two months. (Jinshi)

data.title: After reducing some of his long ETH positions, Brother Machi deposited 250,000 USDC into Hyperliquid to continue increasing his holdings.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, after ETH fell below $2,900, Machi reduced some of his long ETH positions to avoid liquidation. He then deposited 250,000 USDC into Hyperliquid to increase his long positions. He currently holds 4,450 ETH, with a liquidation price of $2,841.97.

data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will launch SPACEUSDT and FIGHTUSDT perpetual contracts.

data.title: A whale deposited 1.82 million USDC into Hyperliquid to open long positions in BTC, ETH, and HYPE, with the current position valued at $25.9 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale deposited 1.82 million USDC into Hyperliquid over the past 3 days to open long positions in BTC, ETH, and HYPE, with a current position value of $25.9 million. This includes: a 40x leveraged Bitcoin long position of 200.67 BTC ($17.79 million), a 25x leveraged Ethereum long position of 2000 ETH ($5.81 million), and a 10x leveraged HYPE long position of 104,319 HYPE ($2.28 million).
